meaning: n.录取入学,(大学的)入学考试
examples: In secondary schools across South Africa, students are taking matriculation exams.
I'll go to college if I pass the Matriculation Exam.
Today is the first day of National Matriculation Test.
And over the past four years, nearly every member has passed his or her matriculation exams.
It looked like the first string versus the practice squad in the ease of their matriculation down the field.
